---
title: Current Projects
---

<!-- 
Tabs:
- Defects
- Phase transitions
- ML driven
    - PINNs for  

 -->

Continuation of Ms. Shaheen's work:


- Phase Transitions
(Motivation)
    - Anion exchange induced (Easy, MS level)
    - Defect induced (Easy)

- Electron phonon coupling
- Polaron formation
- Multiexciton generation

Topological materials

- Data-driven
- PINNs on Topological Materials

High Physics 


- Electrocatalysis
(Device level modeling)
